name: Chicken Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 8 chicken breast halves, skin and bone removed, pounded to 1/2"
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a ziplock bag.
2. Add chicken, a few pieces at a time, and shake to coat.
3. Heat oil in a skillet; cook chicken, turning frequently, until browned and juices run clear, about 6-8 minutes.
